meaning: adj.安道尔[人,语]的n.安道尔人
examples: Hungarian Turan will drive a Fiesta, while Abarth Grande Punto is the car of choice for Andorran Llovera.
Fellow striker Peter Crouch scrambled home the sixth after a misunderstanding in the Andorran defense.
Antoni Marti, the head of the Andorran government, told French President Francois Hollande that he will introduce a bill before 30 June.
